## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential project opportunities for Andrew at growthx.ai following his graduation.](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrew graduated recently, available mid-July for potential projects](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [growthx.ai offers diverse projects: content ops, platform dev, community building](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Bianca to send project proposals by Thursday, flexible on engagement type (internship/contractor)](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

## Topics

### Andrew's Availability

  - [Recently graduated, committed to something until early/mid-July](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Available for potential projects starting mid-July](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Precise timing to be confirmed in a couple of weeks](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)

### growthx.ai Overview

  - [Content operations platform + agency model](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [70-75 full-time employees, rapidly growing since Sept 2022](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Led by Marcel (CEO), former CMO of DeepGram, Scale AI experience](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Hired ex-TechCrunch editor-in-chief as Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Project Opportunities

  - [Podcast production: 45-60 min episodes, need project management for each](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Video content remixing: Create 30-45 sec social media snippets](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Landing page development: High-volume, AI-integrated content creation](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [CEO podcast outreach: Compile list, pitch for Marcel's appearances](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Prospect Hub completion: Finalize Lovable prototype, implement on website](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Event ROI tool refinement: Brand matching, GitHub integration](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Platform development: Similar to AeroOps, workflow-focused](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Internal/customer education: Create materials for new proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Community building: Plan webinars, workshops, in-person events (e.g., CMO breakfast)](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### growthx.ai Business Model

  - [Half platform, half agency](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Inbound-focused currently, no outbound or ads](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Evolving towards media outlet model with journalist integration](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Work streams include link building, case studies, PR services](https://fathom.video/share/z7yCJ9fKiQxbmtABAcFMcUAGeV-WcqN3?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

## Next Steps
